github.//token: PAT with Copilot metrics access. Enterprise: 'manage_billing:copilot' OR 'read:enterprise' (fine-grained: View Enterprise Copilot Metrics). Org: 'read:org'. Leave empty to run on demo data.

targets.//: Set 'enterprise' and/or 'organizations'. Copilot metrics need >=5 active members or the API returns empty.
